Tentative Quiz 2

Study Materials

Note that Quiz 2 is cumulative, and will include what we’ve already covered re: functions, expressions, and data types.

  • Please do the practice mini-quizzes and full-length quizzes.

Practice Quiz

The practice quizzes will be published on Wednesday of Week 6. Practice Quiz 2a is configured so that it only works with the Lockdown Browser. Start studying early. You can take the quiz as many times as you want to practice.

How to Take The Actual Quiz

Like Quiz 1, Quiz 2 will take place in class using the Lockdown Browser.
